message:
feat(mux): floating pane protocol implementation, runtime pane constraint overrides, and stack operation wiring

Floating pane client-side protocol (mux_client.rs):
- Add expect_unit_response helper for cleaner UnitResponse dispatch
- Implement create_floating_pane, move_floating_pane, set_floating_pane_z,
  toggle_floating_pane, remove_floating_pane client methods wrapping the
  corresponding PDU messages with FloatingPaneRect positioning
- Import new codec PDU types: CreateFloatingPane, CycleStack,
  MoveFloatingPane, RemoveFloatingPane, SelectStackPane,
  SetFloatingPaneZ, SetLayoutCycle, SwapToLayout, ToggleFloatingPane,
  UpdatePaneConstraints
- Import FloatingPaneRect from mux::tab
- Implement swap_to_layout, set_layout_cycle, cycle_stack,
  select_stack_pane, update_pane_constraints client methods

Floating pane server-side handlers (sessionhandler.rs):
- Add find_tab_matching, find_tab_with_floating_pane, and
  find_tab_containing_pane helpers for locating tabs by predicate
- Implement CreateFloatingPane handler: creates a floating overlay in
  the target tab, or updates rect/focus if the pane already exists as
  floating; rejects panes that are already tiled
- Implement MoveFloatingPane, SetFloatingPaneZ, ToggleFloatingPane, and
  RemoveFloatingPane handlers, each looking up the owning tab and
  dispatching the corresponding Tab method
- Wire CycleStack forward parameter (was previously ignored `_`), routing
  to cycle_stack or cycle_stack_backward based on direction
- Replace stub SelectStackPane handler with real implementation that
  dispatches to tab.select_stack_pane(slot_index, pane_index)
- Replace stub UpdatePaneConstraints handler with real implementation
  that dispatches to tab.update_pane_constraints with all five parameters
- Remove the catch-all wildcard match arm (`_ => ...`) since all PDU
  variants are now explicitly handled

Runtime pane constraint overrides (tab.rs):
- Add constraint_overrides HashMap<PaneId, PaneConstraints> to TabInner,
  allowing runtime constraint mutation without modifying the underlying
  Pane trait implementation
- Add effective_pane_constraints helper that checks overrides before
  falling back to pane.pane_constraints()
- Add normalize_runtime_pane_constraints to clamp min >= 1, enforce
  max >= min, and clamp preferred within [min, max]
- Thread overrides through compute_min_size, compute_axis_constraints,
  compute_min_size_with_collapsed, compute_split_resize_budget,
  find_split_budget, adjust_x_size, adjust_y_size, and
  pane_axis_constraints — every layout calculation now respects
  runtime constraint overrides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
